Internal Memorandum

To: Acquisition Committee  
From: Dr. Emily Tan, Head of Mergers & Acquisitions  
Date: October 25, 2023  
Subject: Project Phoenix - Unannounced Acquisition Proposal

Please find below a brief overview of the proposed acquisition under Project Phoenix. The target company, Avantech Solutions Pte. Ltd., currently registered under UEN T12345678A, has shown substantial growth in the AI sector. Our proposed acquisition amount stands at SGD 45 million. This strategic move is expected to enhance our technological capabilities and market reach.

Key Contact: Mr. Jonathan Lee, CEO of Avantech Solutions, can be reached at +65 6123 4567 or jonathan.lee@avantech.sg. For internal inquiries, please contact Ms. Sarah Lim at sarah.lim@corpstrategy.sg.

Further due diligence is recommended. A preliminary report is attached, and a follow-up meeting is scheduled for November 5, 2023.

NRIC for reference: S2345678B.  

Please review and provide feedback by October 30, 2023.
